---
title: "Introduction to toypackageTZ"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to toypackageTZ}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The `toypackageTZ` provides convenience functions for some common tasks. To install this package from GitHub, use

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("TDMZ443/toypackageTZ")
```

Load the package using the following code.

```{r setup}
library(toypackageTZ)
```

The package contains three functions

* `strsplit1`

* `min_max_scale`
* `theme_academic`
